flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Joaquin Delta College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at San Joaquin Delta College fell 20% between 2009 and 2010 (9.4% → 7.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Joaquin Delta College rose 11% between 2007 and 2010 ($560 → $624).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Joaquin Delta College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
